title: More Bookshelves Mod
description: Are you sick of vanilla bookshelves? Well, now you have bookshelves for every wood in the game!
body:
Are you sick of vanilla bookshelves? Well, now you have bookshelves for every wood in the game! 

 

This is my first mod, if there are any bugs or issues let me know, i'll get it worked out.

 

Not only are these available, but you can also craft all of them too! if you use different kinds of wood, it just gives you the standard bookshelf.

Thank you!

  enjoy!!
